expectedIssues: Casino icon design/layout is broken in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: Several right-side items are visibly cut off, including the “Hot Games” tab and the third game card in each row. This may be intended as a horizontal carousel, but visually it looks like content is overflowing the viewport without a clear cue.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid content. The lower game cards are partially hidden behind the nav bar.
The carousel/banner navigation arrows sit very close to the screen edges and the right arrow appears partially clipped.
Some labels are truncated by clipping, such as the top tab text beginning “Hot Ga…”.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues specifically describe the casino icon in the bottom nav bar being broken in design or layout; they mention other nav/layout problems but not this specific element.
